item.title: Well this went way deeper than I expected
item.description:
So far so good.
Ah yes.
...sure!
Seems legit?
It has a certain je ne sais quoi.
Reality tenuously holding on here.
We're departing rationality, very quickly.
Surrealism incarnate. Most Viral edit: You like me! You really like me! ??? Thank you all for most viral! For a lowly, most times lurker it is an honor. <3
item.dc:creator: Fimbulvintr

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
might need some sriracha or somethin
just how it is
aw come on someone.. really messin me up over here
don't even think about it
uh oh. better press ok just to be safe
yes
mmm hmm
i need a frog phone like yesterday
or the rules of apostrophes
ahhh.. that old chestnut
i will post anything relating to C&C
please dont take someone's inhaler gang
i missed a flight once. really screwed things up
i don't really feel threatened tbh
i would make them actually sing
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.description: He later retracted it and said his words were "deeply insensitive" to those who are affected by the cost of living crisis and job losses. So it is all good now.

item.title: Happy Birthday to the Dark Lord
item.description: James Earl Jones turns 93 today. Hail Vader.
item.dc:creator: DrYuaTakeda

item.title: My Boy Chester's Eulogy
item.description:
He passed on to the rainbow bridge on Monday. I've been a wreck since. I thought I could write some ramblings about him before my memory of him faded in any way. These are things to never forget.
I will miss his tiny butt and his pink peats. How much he hated me patting his butt
I will miss giving him chest rubs. Chester was named for how much he loved them. I promise I gave one near the end.
I will miss how he liked sleeping in between my legs. How over the years my legs changed shape to accommodate his shape, and how I wanted him to sleep around in the crook of my arm and how he also changed to accommodate my wants.
I will miss him waiting for me outside the bathroom. Demanding and waiting for me to make time for him. To give him a chest rub and a kiss on the forehead.
I will miss his freckled nose. How pink it would get when he was warm. I will miss his little teeths poking out and his freckled bottom lip.
I will miss him waiting for me. Seeing him through a window or door or him waiting for me on my bed after a long day.
I will miss how he would plomp right next to me. No matter what.
I will miss calling for him and him appearing a short time later.
I will miss how particular he was about his food. He liked it warm, and he would cry and whine at me because the kettle was too slow and he wanted food immediately.
I will miss cleaning after him. He puked a lot and would often have strands of my hair in his poop. I would worry but always laugh at how badly he'd didn't want his butt cleaned.
I will miss how scared he was. The quintessential scaredy cat. Any little sound would make him look around in fear. He heard a lot of sounds before he died. I tried my best to protect him.
The louder the sounds got, the greater his urge was to hide. Usually poorly with his butt sticking out. But if I was there, he would hide underneath the covers and in between my legs. The safest place in the world for him.
I will miss how much he'd progressed past his adolescent trauma. How brave and social he slowly was becoming.
He never liked people touching his paws. I hoped one day, he'd allow me that privilege. I held his paws as he passed.
I wish people knew him when he was stubborn, when he was a jerk, and when he was horny. How much an ass he was to other cats because he wanted to smell their butts. How brave he could become in front of dogs but cowered away when anyone stood above him.
I will miss making him little pillow caves to hide in.
I will miss his smell. He was a bad groomer and he stunk on occasion.
I will miss his perfectly round head as it sat in my palm. How he'd rub his scents onto mine.
I will miss his little snore and how he showed off his belly when he got comfortable.
I will miss how brave he got in the last year alive. How he would venture out with our other cat and see the grass and the sky.
He was scared but always curious.
I'm happy I was able to make him my famous turkey before he went. He liked chicken so much. I wish I had made him some in the last week.
I will miss worrying about him. I will miss thinking about what he would be up to.
I wouldn't be alive without him. Been in some bad times in my life but his presence was a bedrock.
I will miss you. And hopefully I never forget you.
My specialest boy. Chepper. The Cheddar.
I will miss his perfect eyes that always seem like they were on the verge of crying.
I always wanted people to meet him, no matter how scared he was. He was a perfect scaredy boy and I wanted to share him to the world. I wish more people knew him.
This was Chester.
item.dc:creator: FrancyCakes

item.title: 2023 Weight loss goal achieved!
item.description:
Seeing the scale tip over 200 was definitely a wake up call.
It took a year but I did it! I mainly concentrated on calories and that seemed to be the key for me.
item.dc:creator: morganblue1988

item.title: Dumping 37 editions of memes off my phone
item.description:
Good for him!
I'm American, our police don't run...
Good on you, Ethan
I'd sign this petition
This lol is to indicate that my message is not hostile
That's hot
Dunno the sauce, but this is absolutely what trying to host an online class from my home office is like
Pavlov of dog fame inadvertently taught his dogs to really, really enjoy being shocked with electricity... oops. No kink shaming the dogs please.
Me: "I'm the best!" A student: "you are! You're my role model." Me: "oh God. Reconsider."
I'm an aspirin or aleve gal. Tylenol can suck it.
I'll take five.
I was out to lunch with a colleague and told her I didn't like that rite aid near us because "it has CVS vibes". Place is an alternate dimension and I don't like it.
Promised myself I'd never pay for a dating app again. If I was into paying someone to torture me, the apps would've been successful.
Look up the video, it's cute
Wholesome masculinity ftw!
We have not
Started to do this to my gen z students as an elder millennial. Works every time. So does attempting to use their slang. It's lit, fam.
Quality time!
Men are often abused and neglected, or treated like they are all the same. Many men have been awful, but never assume they all are, or you're as bad as those who treat women as inferior. There are lots of good boys out there, bront.
I have a chonky cat too. She's on a diet. No it is not working.
I've seen worse in my classes
At a work event last semester, I grumbled for the first half of our seminar, then at the end gathered a group and provided a piece by piece breakdown of what cheeses were on the charcuterie board. They had a raclette!!!!
Left from July, but probably still applies any time of year. In my redneck neighborhood it does at least...
It is Wednesday my dudes
Ugh, this was from when I started dating a guy at work. Six months later he still wouldn't admit we were dating, so I walked away. I don't have to let someone treat me like a convenience. Second time that's happened too...
I'm going to hell for my sense of humor but I'll be laughing the entire time
He's right though
Kif, do it without the prolonged sighing, it's picking up on the mic
Accurate
Clarice has wares if you have coin. (Yes her left eye is blind, but she's fine, it's been checked by a vet. Left over from uveitis as a kitten.)
item.dc:creator: AnxiousCuttlefish

item.title: Please take these memes so I can update my phone.
item.description:
I did send this to my brother after our dad died. Ideas for next time, I guess.
I am morning people. My bf is night people.
This is Ciri. After two years she finally let me pet her. I think she knows I’m moving soon and she wanted to taunt me.
item.dc:creator: ptothedubs

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1082 (Confuscian DnD)
item.description:
We are awake. We are the servants of the Pippin. You will be assimilated. We are chaos. Let's get this bread.
Birds. Are. Dinosaurs. Birds. Are. Dinosaurs.
I'm definitely Radagast.
The Judgement of Stargate
Dapper AF tiger.
Pure Land Buddhism is fascinating to me because of the influences it absorbed from both Manichaeism and Nestorian Christianity, which used to be very abundant religions in Eastern Asia until after the collapse of the Mongol Khanate.
Warring States China was a MESS.
If I met a Trans dude named Curzon, I would lose my everloving shit and buy them so many beers.
We made friends with a new elf druid in our campaign because of tree talk.
This is my favorite form of religious and cultural synchronism
I have an excruciating headache this morning, and I'm trying to figure out if it's from lack of caffeine, a migraine from weather changes, allergies, lack of good sleep because Pippin chewed the CPAP mask so it doesn't fit properly anymore, or just my head being a dick.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Good boy. Hello. What? What the fuck? Up." I just finished a painting of a Leptoceratops, and the coloration of this dinosaur was inspired by Pippin. Would imgur like to see it? EDIT: Apparently, Imgur would like to see it, so here we go: https://imgur.com/gallery/Er9aCgR
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

mood
:)

kbity!
WHO FOUND THIS PIC OF ME?!
P I S S

item.title: Dont forget the suffering of the Uyguhrs
item.description:
Hello everyone, I would like to remind everyone of the suffering of the Uyghurs. China is still committing genocide in East Turkmensitan. Uyghurs are still being forced into slave labor and their women are still being raped.
Uyghurs are still being held in concentration camps. Please also fight for the welfare of the Uyghurs and speak out against this injustice!
These are their faces. People like you and me who are oppressed because they are Muslims. Please don't forget the Uyghurs! Please support the Uyghur Human Rights Project if possible: https://uhrp.org/
item.dc:creator: IslamExplained
